title: Graph package boundary lane precheck
delta_summary: local package initializer exports stable graph public surface (`__all__`)
aggregates core graph symbols for compatibility with `from framework.graph import ...` imports

risk_signals.evidence: without package exports, callers rely on deep module paths and become brittle
risk_signals.impact: upstream replay can break import contracts used by runtime/server/tests

planned_validation: uv run --package framework pytest core/framework/server/tests/test_api.py -k 'execution or queen' -q
uv run --package framework python - <<'PY' ... import framework.graph export check ... PY
decision_gate: prefer keep_local if public graph package exports remain required and validation stays green
